description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, multi-tiered shingle roof with a prominent central gable and several smaller roof sections extending over side wings. The exterior is clad in dark wooden planks, giving it a rustic, traditional appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch with decorative arches and wooden railings, leading to a recessed main entryway. Large, multi-pane windows with ornate trim are symmetrically arranged on the upper story, while a long, single-story extension with a lower roof runs along one side. The structure is elevated slightly above ground, with visible steps leading up to the porch. Architectural details such as the overhanging eaves, wooden columns, and intricate woodwork contribute to a historic, craftsman-like charm.
description: A large, rustic wooden house with a steep, multi-tiered shingle roof, covered porch, and symmetrical multi-pane windows. The structure features detailed woodwork and a long side extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch with decorative arches, central gable, and covered steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long single-story extension, large multi-pane windows, and the depth of the main roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of upper windows and the full expanse of the main roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the extension, windows, and a glimpse of the porch structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with decorative arches, wooden railings, steps, and a recessed main door
